---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused product improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## User need

What job-search or application-management problem should AAAAT solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the smallest useful behavior change.

## Boundaries

Explain how the proposal preserves local ownership, manual desktop operation,
provider neutrality, and the bounded external-AI authority model.

## Non-goals

List related functionality that should remain out of scope.
